skills.name: Enervate
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7Reduce target's ATK and MATK by Get(9)% for 2 rounds.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to prolong the duration.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n4Lv 1-7: 2 Rounds;<n4Lv 7-12: 3 Rounds;<n2Duration prolongs by STR goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Double Hit
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax() for the 1st hit, Get(30)% of this damage for the 2nd hit.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to inflict one more attack.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1) ;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Bleed
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: Get(9) per round;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to prolong bleeding duration.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1) ;<n4Lv 1-5: 2 Rounds;<n4Lv 6-9: 3 Rounds;<n4Lv 10-12: 4 Rounds;<n2Bleeding duration prolongs by STR goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Spirit Puncture
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7Attract target's next attack, only work on monsters.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to attract more attacks in the next rounds.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1)<n4Lv 1-7: 1 Round;<n4Lv.8-12��2 rounds;<n2Attract more attacks by STR goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Cleave
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax() each;<n7Attack several targets in a row.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to attack one more target on both sides, each target takes a bit less damage, but total damage increases.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1) ;<n4Lv 1-2: 1 Target;<n4Lv 3-12��3 Targets;<n2(1 more target on both sides);<n4Bonus: 5 Tatgets;<n2(2 more targets on both sides);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Confuse
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7A hit with a certain chance to confuse the target.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to prolong Confuse duration;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n4Lv 1-5: 2 Rounds;<n4Lv 6-12: 3 Rounds;<n2Confuse duration prolongs by STR goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Utmost Strike
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax() each;<n7Attack at most 2 targets in line.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to seal targets' skills for a round.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1) ;<n4Lv 1-2: 1 Target;<n4Lv 3-12: 2 Targets;<n2Sealing effect prolongs by STR goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Focus Attack
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7A hit with a big critical chance.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to inflict another attack on the same target.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1) ;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Iron Skin
skills.description: ;<n7Defense goes up Get(9)% for 2 rounds;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to prolong the duration.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n2Duration prolongs by STR goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Frightening Hit
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7A hit with 100% Hit Rate;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to increase Hit Rate of the next attack.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Blood Drain
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7Heal yourself for a part of the damage;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to heal more damage.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1) ;<n2Healing effect promotes by skill level goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Slaughter
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7Attack certain targets.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to focus all damage to the foes on a single target.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n4Lv 1: 1 Target;<n4Lv 2: 2 Targets;<n4Lv 3-12: 3 Targets;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Easy Attack
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7Bonus: Slight chance to inflict more damage.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Agilely Attack
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7Dodging rate goes up Get(9)% for 2 rounds.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to prolong the duration.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n2Duration prolongs by DEX goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Icy Assault
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7Increase target's MP consumption by Get(9)%  in the next 3 rounds.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to prolong the duration.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n2Duration prolongs by DEX goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Riptide Impact
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax() each;<n7Attack several targets. Damage goes down a bit by targets goes up.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to inflict more damage.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n4Lv 1: 1 Target;<n4Lv 2: 2 Targets;<n4Lv3-12: 3 Targets;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Puzzle
skills.description: ;<n7Reduce all allies' MP consumption and change team formation for 2 rounds.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to increase all allys' resistance to abnormal status.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n2Duration prolongs by DEX goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Counterattack
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7Attract a target's attack and give a counterattack.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance too give a 100% successful counterattack.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Dedicate
skills.description: ;<n7Give a chance to an ally to inflict the 1st attack in the next round.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to remove a debuff from the ally.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Accurate Strike
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7You'll have 100% hit rate in the next 2 rounds after using this skill.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n2Duration prolongs by DEX goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Conceal
skills.description: ;<n7Vanish from your enemies and become invisible for 2 rounds. Nobody can attack you during the period and you cannot attack with any skills either.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to allow you to attack with skills.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n4Lv 1-5: 2 Rounds;<n4Lv 6-10: 3 Rounds;<n4Lv 11-12: 5 Rounds;<n7Cooldown shortens by skill level goes up.;<n2Duration prolongs by DEX goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Slow Down
skills.description: ;<n7Slow down a target for 2 rounds to make him/her attack later.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to prolong the duration.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n2Duration prolongs by DEX goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Through Shot
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax() each;<n7Attack 2 targets in line.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to inflict more damage.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Mana Steal
skills.description: ;<n7Steal a target's MP and restore yours.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to steal more MP.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n2Steal more MP by skill level goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Pet Healing
skills.description: ;<n7Heal GetMin() damage of your pet per round for 3 rounds.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to prolong the duration.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n2Duration prolongs by VIT goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Epee Chop
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7Bonus: Slight chance to slow down the target.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Defiant
skills.description: ;<n7Transfer Get(9)% ATK into Get(10)% DEF and attract a target's attacks in the next rounds.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to increase DEF by 5% without losing ATK.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n4Lv 1-3: 3 Rounds;<n4Lv 4-6: 4 Rounds;<n4Lv 7-9: 5 Rounds;<n4Lv 10-12: 6 Rounds;<n2Duration prolongs by VIT goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Static Bolt
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7Immune to seal, still, Confuse and mana steal for a round.;<n7Slight chance to prolong the immunity for a round.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n4Lv 1-7: 1 Round;<n4Lv 8-12: 2 Rounds;<n2Immunity prolongs by VIT goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Soul Fire
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax() each;<n7Attack 2 targets in line.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to seal targets' skills for a round.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n2Bonus effect prolongs by VIT goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Lion's Roar
skills.description: ;<n7Increase allies' ATK and DEF by Get(9)% for several rounds.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to increase more DEF.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n4Lv 1-8: Enhance a single target for a round;<n4Lv 9-11: Enhance a target and adjacent 4 targets for 2 rounds;<n4Lv 12: Enhance a target and adjacent 8 targets for 3 rounds;<n2Duration prolongs by VIT goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Divine Bless
skills.description: ;<n7Bless you allies, increase their aptitude by a certain value, and increase their MDEF & MATK by Get(9)% temporarily.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n4Lv 1-8: Bless a single target for a round.;<n4Lv 9-11: Bless a target and 4 adjacent targets for 2 rounds.;<n4Lv 12: Bless a target and 8 adjacent targets for 3 rounds.;<n2Duration prolongs by VIT goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Revive
skills.description: ;<n7Revive a dead ally.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to restore more HP for the revived ally.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Dispel
skills.description: ;<n7Remove a buff from an enemy or a debuff from an ally.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to increase success rate.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Haste
skills.description: ;<n7Increase an ally's DEX to allow him/her to attack earlier.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n4Lv 1-7: 1 Round;<n4Lv 8-12: 2 Rounds;<n2Duration prolongs by VIT goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Stun
skills.description: ;<n7Stun a target for a round.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to increase your resistance to abnormal status.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n2Duration prolongs by VIT goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Sacrifice
skills.description: ;<n7Heal an ally with your life.;<n7Bonus: Heal more damage for the ally.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Fire Ball
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7Bonus: Slight chance to explode, affect 1 more target in a row on both sides.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Frost Bolt
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7Bonus: Slight chance to freeze the target for a round.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n2Freezing effect prolongs by INT goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Cure
skills.description: ;<n7Restore GetMin() HP for an ally.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to restore more HP.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Regenerate
skills.description: ;<n7Heal GetMin() damage per round for 3 rounds.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to revive a dead ally and restore some HP for him/her.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n2Duration prolongs by INT goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Flame Shot
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax() each;<n7Attack 2 targets in line.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to inflict more damage.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Crash
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax() each;<n7Attack the target and 2 adjacent targets in a row.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to slow down the targets.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Seal
skills.description: ;<n7Seal several targets' skills for 2 rounds.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to seal all physical attacks and skills.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n4Lv 1-3: 1 Target;<n4Lv 4-9: 2 Targets;<n4Lv 10-12: 3 Targets;<n2Sealing effect prolongs by INT goes up.;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Hypnosis
skills.description: ;<n7Turn several targets into sleep for 3 rounds.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance the targets won't wake up by damage.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n4Lv 1-5 1 Target;<n4Lv 6-8 2 Targets;<n4Lv9 3 Targets;<n4Lv10-12 4 Targets;<n2Duration prolongs by INT goes up;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Mana Burn
skills.description: ;<n7Reduce target's MP.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to burn more MP.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Volcano
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax();<n7Attack 3 targets.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to reduce targets' MAX HP temporarily.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Blizzard
skills.description: ;<n7Damage: GetMin()-GetMax() each;<n7Attack several targets.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to freeze the targets.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n4Lv 1: 1 Target;<n4Lv 2-5: 2 Targets;<n4Lv 6-9: 3 Targets;<n4Lv 10-12: 4 Targets;<n8Lv 11 & 12 are Aptitude Skills. See Skill Panel for details.

skills.name: Gospel
skills.description: ;<n7Heal several allies for 2 rounds.;<n7Bonus: Slight chance to heal more damage.;<n6MP Consumption: Get(1);<n4Lv 1-5: Heal the target and 4 adjacent targets.;<n4Lv 6-12: Heal the target and all allies around.;<n2Healing duration prolongs by INT goes up.
